description: Generic document fallback — extract universal metadata fields when no specific schema matches

fields.name: document_title
fields.prompt: Extract the document title or heading. Return the first prominent heading or title text found.

fields.name: document_type
fields.prompt: Describe the type of document in one or two words (e.g. 'Report', 'Letter', 'Form', 'Certificate', 'Policy'). Be specific but concise.

fields.name: author_or_issuer
fields.prompt: Extract the author, issuer, or organisation that produced this document. Return null if not determinable.

fields.name: recipient
fields.prompt: Extract the intended recipient or addressee. Return null if not addressed to a specific party.

fields.name: document_date
fields.prompt: Extract the most prominent date on this document in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Return null if not found.

fields.name: summary
fields.prompt: Summarise this document in two to four sentences. Include the purpose, key facts, and any significant conclusions or decisions.

fields.name: key_dates
fields.prompt: Extract any significant dates mentioned in the document as a JSON array of {label, date} objects where date is YYYY-MM-DD. Return empty array if none.

fields.name: key_parties
fields.prompt: Extract the names of key people, companies, or organisations mentioned in this document as a JSON array of strings. Limit to 5 most significant. Return empty array if none.
